metadata.description: Tech-stack agnostic software engineering skills for AI coding agents — TDD, design patterns, DDD, system design, refactoring, and more

plugins.name: software-skills
plugins.description: 9 curated software engineering skills for Claude Code: TDD cycle orchestration, structured code review, GoF and modern design patterns, domain-driven design, branch analysis, git conventions, refactoring catalog, distributed system design, and twelve-factor app methodology
